findings.description: The JSP code example for submitLinkDisabledJsp omits the first line `<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" %>` that is present in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source example begins with `<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" %>` followed by the taglib directive, but the knowledge file's code block starts directly with `<%@ taglib prefix="n" uri="http://tis.co.jp/nablarch" %>`.
